_doc: USD per 1M tokens (input, output). Only rates documented inside this repo are marked verified. null = rate not on file; the cost script then reports token counts only. Actual provider billing (batch discounts, cache, CNY conversion) overrides any token-math estimate.

gpt-5.5.source: BM1d adapter notes ($30/M output); input rate not on file -> output-only lower bound

claude-sonnet-5.source: not on file; batch run, harvest usage/cost from Anthropic console

kimi-k2.6.source: Moonshot bills CNY; batch at 50% list -> token-math invalid, use console billing
